---
title: "0.4_review_conflicts_pt1"
author: "Devi Veytia"
date: "2024-03-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Set up -- run before anything else

```{r set up libraries}
## Load libraries
library(dplyr)
library(dbplyr)
library(R.utils)
library(RSQLite)
library(ggplot2)

# set up functions
sourceFn <- dir(here::here("R"))
for(i in 1:length(sourceFn)){
  source(here::here("R", sourceFn[i]))
}

```

```{r set the seed}
addTaskCallback(function(...) {set.seed(123);TRUE})
```

## Download article answers

```{r load in screening answers at title and abstract stage}

# Load answers from training screening and all screening and combine
train <- readxl::read_excel(here::here("data/derived-data/screen-train/ArticleAnswers_train_set1.xlsx"))
all <- readxl::read_excel(here::here("data/derived-data/screen-all/ArticleAnswers_conflictsResolved_2024-03-27.xlsx"))
df <- rbind(train, all)
df <- df %>%
  mutate(sysrev_id = as.numeric(`Article ID`),
         include = as.logical(Include)) %>%
  rename(title = Title) 



## This code formats User answers to wide, but don't need this because I'm using the Article answers format
# df_wide <- reshape2::dcast(formula = sysrev_id + title ~ `User Name`, value.var = 'Include',data = df)


```

```{r remove duplicates and load deduplicated data}
## Remove duplicates
#dups <- revtools::screen_duplicates(as.data.frame(df))
df_unique <- readr::read_csv(here::here("data/derived-data/screen-all/ArticleAnswers_conflictsResolved_2024-03-27_deduplicated.csv"))
df_unique$label <- NULL
df_unique$matches <- NULL

df_unique <- df_unique %>%
  left_join(df %>% select(sysrev_id, `Exclusion criteria`), by = c("sysrev_id"))
```

```{r Write file on all the exclusions based on literature review}

reviews <- df_unique %>%
  filter(grepl("literature review", `Exclusion criteria`))
nrow(reviews) # 30 reviews -- remove these from the dataframe of conflicts

writexl::write_xlsx(reviews, here::here("data/derived-data/screen-all/ArticleAnswers_conflictsResolved_2024-03-27_literatureReviews.xlsx"))
```

```{r join with article metadata}
p4_db <- RSQLite::dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(),
                    here::here("data","raw-data","product4.sqlite"), 
                                create=FALSE)
screenRecs <- tbl(p4_db, "trainRecsSample") %>% collect()
dbDisconnect(p4_db)


df_unique <- fuzzyjoin::stringdist_full_join(df_unique, 
                                      screenRecs %>% 
                                        select(analysis_id, title, abstract),
                                      by ="title", max_dist=2, ignore_case = TRUE)


# Keep title from original metadata and format/clean data frame
df_unique <- df_unique %>%
  select(sysrev_id, analysis_id, include, title.y, abstract, `Exclusion criteria`) %>%
  rename(title = title.y)  

summary(df_unique)
nrow(df_unique)

```



```{r summarise screening results}
keyLabels <- c("Population","Intervention","Literature review","Outcome")
keyLabelCounts <- rep(NA, length(keyLabels))

for(l in 1:length(keyLabels)){
  keyLabelCounts[l] <- sum(grepl(keyLabels[l], df_unique$`Exclusion criteria`, ignore.case = TRUE))
}

sumdf <- rbind(
  data.frame(
    statistic = "Inclusion",
    label = c("Include","Exclude"),
    counts = c(sum(df_unique$include), length(df_unique$include)-sum(df_unique$include))
  ),
  data.frame(
    statistic = "Exclusion label",
    label = keyLabels,
    counts = keyLabelCounts
  )
)
sumdf$label <- factor(sumdf$label, 
                      levels = c("Include","Exclude",keyLabels))

screeningSummary_ggp <- ggplot(sumdf, aes(x=label, y=counts, fill = label))+
  geom_col()+
  geom_text(aes(label = counts), vjust = -0.2)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust=1, hjust=1)
  )
screeningSummary_ggp
```
